title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indigo Paints

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indigo Paints
jsonLd.description:
We at Indigo Paints are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
